name: 2D Top-Down RPG
description: Classic top-down RPG with 8-directional movement, NPC interaction, and dialogue. Features smooth grid-free movement, sprite animation direction, and a basic NPC system with dialogue triggers.
features: NPC interaction system with proximity detection
Camera smoothing that follows the player

player_speed.description: Player walk speed in pixels per second

run_speed.description: Player run speed when holding shift

npc_interact_range.description: Distance in pixels for NPC interaction

dialog_speed.description: Seconds per character in typewriter effect
